description.en: Upload a PDF and issue a verifiable digital certificate on the blockchain. The recipient gets an email to claim it.
description.de: PDF hochladen und ein verifizierbares digitales Zertifikat auf der Blockchain ausstellen. Der Empfänger erhält eine E-Mail zum Einlösen.
description.fr: Téléchargez un PDF et émettez un certificat numérique vérifiable sur la blockchain. Le destinataire reçoit un email pour le réclamer.
description.es: Sube un PDF y emite un certificado digital verificable en la blockchain. El destinatario recibe un email para reclamarlo.
description.ro: Încarcă un PDF și emite un certificat digital verificabil pe blockchain. Destinatarul primește un email pentru a-l revendica.
description.it: Upload a PDF and issue a verifiable digital certificate on the blockchain. The recipient gets an email to claim it.

description.en: Issue and verify digital certificates on the blockchain. Permanently anchored — tamper-proof, instantly verifiable.
description.de: Digitale Zertifikate auf der Blockchain ausstellen und verifizieren. Dauerhaft verankert — fälschungssicher und sofort überprüfbar.
description.fr: Émettez et vérifiez des certificats numériques sur la blockchain. Ancrés en permanence — infalsifiables et vérifiables instantanément.
description.es: Emite y verifica certificados digitales en la blockchain. Anclados permanentemente — a prueba de manipulaciones, verificables al instante.
description.ro: Emite și verifică certificate digitale pe blockchain. Ancorate permanent — imposibil de falsificat, verificabile instant.

warp.name: Certificate: Issue

description.en: Upload a PDF and issue a verifiable digital certificate on the blockchain. The recipient gets an email to claim it.
description.de: PDF hochladen und ein verifizierbares digitales Zertifikat auf der Blockchain ausstellen. Der Empfänger erhält eine E-Mail zum Einlösen.
description.fr: Téléchargez un PDF et émettez un certificat numérique vérifiable sur la blockchain. Le destinataire reçoit un email pour le réclamer.
description.es: Sube un PDF y emite un certificado digital verificable en la blockchain. El destinatario recibe un email para reclamarlo.
description.ro: Încarcă un PDF și emite un certificat digital verificabil pe blockchain. Destinatarul primește un email pentru a-l revendica.
description.it: Upload a PDF and issue a verifiable digital certificate on the blockchain. The recipient gets an email to claim it.

warp.bot: Issue a digital certificate on the blockchain as an NFT. First ask the user to select a collection (or create one), then collect company name, recipient email, PDF upload, and optional expiry.

description.en: Upload the certificate PDF. The fingerprint is computed automatically.
description.de: Lade das Zertifikat-PDF hoch. Der Fingerabdruck wird automatisch berechnet.
description.fr: Téléchargez le PDF du certificat. L'empreinte est calculée automatiquement.
description.es: Sube el PDF del certificado. La huella se calcula automáticamente.
description.ro: Încarcă PDF-ul certificatului. Amprenta este calculată automat.
description.it: Upload the certificate PDF. The fingerprint is computed automatically.

inputs.name: Collection ID

description.en: Select which certificate collection (NFT collection) to issue from. Create a collection first if you don't have one.
description.de: Wähle die Zertifikat-Kollektion (NFT-Kollektion), aus der ausgestellt werden soll. Erstelle zuerst eine Kollektion, falls noch keine vorhanden ist.
description.fr: Sélectionnez la collection de certificats (collection NFT) depuis laquelle émettre.
description.es: Selecciona la colección de certificados (colección NFT) desde la que emitir.
description.ro: Selectează colecția de certificate (colecție NFT) din care să emiți.
description.it: Select which certificate collection (NFT collection) to issue from. Create a collection first if you don't have one.

inputs.bot: The on-chain collection ID to issue the certificate NFT from. Ask the user to provide their collection ID.

inputs.name: Company Name

description.en: Full legal name of the company or person receiving the certificate.
description.de: Vollständiger Name des Unternehmens oder der Person, die das Zertifikat erhält.
description.fr: Nom légal complet de l'entreprise ou de la personne recevant le certificat.
description.es: Nombre legal completo de la empresa o persona que recibe el certificado.
description.ro: Denumirea legală completă a companiei sau persoanei care primește certificatul.
description.it: Full legal name of the company or person receiving the certificate.

inputs.bot: Full legal name of the certificate recipient (company or person).

inputs.name: Document

description.en: Upload the certificate PDF. The SHA-256 fingerprint is stored on the blockchain automatically.
description.de: Zertifikat-PDF hochladen. Der SHA-256-Fingerabdruck wird automatisch auf der Blockchain gespeichert.
description.fr: Téléchargez le PDF du certificat. L'empreinte SHA-256 est stockée sur la blockchain automatiquement.
description.es: Sube el PDF del certificado. La huella SHA-256 se almacena en la blockchain automáticamente.
description.ro: Încarcă PDF-ul certificatului. Amprenta SHA-256 este stocată pe blockchain automat.
description.it: Upload the certificate PDF. The SHA-256 fingerprint is stored on the blockchain automatically.

inputs.bot: Show a file upload embed for the certificate PDF.

inputs.name: Expires At

description.en: When this certificate expires. Leave empty for no expiry.
description.de: Wann dieses Zertifikat abläuft. Leer lassen für kein Ablaufdatum.
description.fr: Quand ce certificat expire. Laisser vide pour pas d'expiration.
description.es: Cuándo expira este certificado. Dejar vacío para sin expiración.
description.ro: Când expiră acest certificat. Lasă gol pentru fără expirare.
description.it: When this certificate expires. Leave empty for no expiry.

inputs.bot: Expiry date. Default to 1 year from today. Can be left empty for no expiry.

inputs.name: Recipient Email

description.en: Email address of the person receiving the certificate. They will get a link to claim it.
description.de: E-Mail-Adresse der Person, die das Zertifikat erhält. Sie erhält einen Link zum Einlösen.
description.fr: Adresse email de la personne recevant le certificat. Elle recevra un lien pour le réclamer.
description.es: Email de la persona que recibe el certificado. Recibirá un enlace para reclamarlo.
description.ro: Adresa de email a persoanei care primește certificatul. Va primi un link pentru a-l revendica.
description.it: Email address of the person receiving the certificate. They will get a link to claim it.

inputs.bot: Email of the certificate recipient. They will receive a claim link. Optional — skip if not sending by email.

body.subject: Your certificate is ready to claim
body.message:
{{COMPANY_NAME}} has been issued a digital certificate.

Claim your certificate here:
{{SITES_BASE}}/certificates/claim?certId={{CERT_ID}}

This certificate is permanently anchored on the blockchain and can be verified by anyone.

success.en: Certificate issued! A claim link has been sent to {{RECIPIENT_EMAIL}}.
success.de: Zertifikat ausgestellt! Ein Claim-Link wurde an {{RECIPIENT_EMAIL}} gesendet.
success.fr: Certificat émis ! Un lien de réclamation a été envoyé à {{RECIPIENT_EMAIL}}.
success.es: ¡Certificado emitido! Un enlace de reclamación fue enviado a {{RECIPIENT_EMAIL}}.
success.ro: Certificat emis! Un link de revendicare a fost trimis la {{RECIPIENT_EMAIL}}.
success.it: Certificate issued! A claim link has been sent to {{RECIPIENT_EMAIL}}.

description.en: Mark a challenge as succeeded or failed after verification. Owner only.
description.de: Challenge nach Überprüfung als erfolgreich oder gescheitert markieren. Nur für Eigentümer.
description.fr: Marquez un defi comme reussi ou echoue apres verification. Reserve au proprietaire.
description.es: Marca un reto como superado o fallido tras verificarlo. Solo para el propietario.
description.ro: Marcheaza provocarea ca reusita sau esuata dupa verificare. Doar pentru proprietar.
description.it: Mark a challenge as succeeded or failed after verification. Owner only.

description.en: Stake-backed personal challenges. Put money on the line and prove it.
description.de: Persönliche Challenges mit echtem Einsatz. Setz etwas aufs Spiel und beweise es.
description.fr: Defis personnels avec mise en jeu. Mettez quelque chose en jeu et prouvez-le.
description.es: Retos personales con dinero en juego. Pon algo en riesgo y demuestralo.
description.ro: Provocari personale sustinute de o miza. Pune ceva in joc si demonstreaza.

warp.name: Challenge: Resolve

description.en: Mark a challenge as succeeded or failed after verification. Owner only.
description.de: Challenge nach Überprüfung als erfolgreich oder gescheitert markieren. Nur für Eigentümer.
description.fr: Marquez un defi comme reussi ou echoue apres verification. Reserve au proprietaire.
description.es: Marca un reto como superado o fallido tras verificarlo. Solo para el propietario.
description.ro: Marcheaza provocarea ca reusita sau esuata dupa verificare. Doar pentru proprietar.
description.it: Mark a challenge as succeeded or failed after verification. Owner only.

warp.bot: Resolves a challenge outcome after the end time. Only callable by the contract owner (JoAi). Use this after verifying the creator's proof. creator_succeeded=true returns stakes to both parties; false sends both stakes to the acceptor.

inputs.name: Creator Succeeded

description.en: Did the creator complete the challenge?
description.de: Hat der Ersteller die Challenge abgeschlossen?
description.fr: Le createur a-t-il releve le defi ?
description.es: La persona creadora cumplio el reto?
description.ro: A dus initiatorul provocarea la capat?
description.it: Did the creator complete the challenge?

inputs.bot: Set to true if the creator provided valid proof of completion, false if they failed or didn't respond.

success.fr: Defi cloture. Les mises ont ete distribuees.
success.es: Reto resuelto. Las apuestas ya se han distribuido.
success.ro: Provocarea a fost rezolvata. Mizele au fost distribuite.

description.en: Send a legally-binding signature request. The signer receives an email and confirms the document with one click.
description.de: Sende eine rechtsverbindliche Signaturanfrage. Der Unterzeichner erhält eine E-Mail und bestätigt das Dokument mit einem Klick.
description.fr: Envoyez une demande de signature juridiquement engageante. Le signataire recoit un e-mail et confirme le document en un clic.
description.es: Envia una solicitud de firma con validez legal. La persona firmante recibe un correo y confirma el documento con un clic.
description.ro: Trimite o cerere de semnatura cu valoare legala. Semnatarul primeste un e-mail si confirma documentul cu un singur clic.
description.it: Send a legally-binding signature request. The signer receives an email and confirms the document with one click.

description.en: On-chain document signatures. Send signing requests by email. All agreements anchored on the blockchain.
description.de: On-chain-Dokumentensignaturen. Signaturanfragen per E-Mail senden. Alle Vereinbarungen auf der Blockchain verankert.
description.fr: Signatures de documents on-chain. Envoyez des demandes de signature par e-mail. Tous les accords sont ancrés sur la blockchain.
description.es: Firmas de documentos on-chain. Envia solicitudes de firma por correo electronico. Todos los acuerdos quedan anclados en la blockchain.
description.ro: Semnaturi de documente on-chain. Trimite cereri de semnare prin e-mail. Toate acordurile sunt ancorate pe blockchain.

warp.name: Signature: Create

description.en: Send a legally-binding signature request. The signer receives an email and confirms the document with one click.
description.de: Sende eine rechtsverbindliche Signaturanfrage. Der Unterzeichner erhält eine E-Mail und bestätigt das Dokument mit einem Klick.
description.fr: Envoyez une demande de signature juridiquement engageante. Le signataire recoit un e-mail et confirme le document en un clic.
description.es: Envia una solicitud de firma con validez legal. La persona firmante recibe un correo y confirma el documento con un clic.
description.ro: Trimite o cerere de semnatura cu valoare legala. Semnatarul primeste un e-mail si confirma documentul cu un singur clic.
description.it: Send a legally-binding signature request. The signer receives an email and confirms the document with one click.

warp.bot: Request a signature on a document. Upload file first (use desk if pinned), then collect title, signer email, optional name and deadline.

description.en: What document needs to be signed?
description.de: Welches Dokument muss unterzeichnet werden?
description.fr: Quel document doit etre signe ?
description.es: Que documento hay que firmar?
description.ro: Ce document trebuie semnat?
description.it: What document needs to be signed?

description.en: Who needs to sign this document?
description.de: Wer muss dieses Dokument unterzeichnen?
description.fr: Qui doit signer ce document ?
description.es: Quien tiene que firmar este documento?
description.ro: Cine trebuie sa semneze acest document?
description.it: Who needs to sign this document?

description.en: Set a deadline for the signature request.
description.de: Frist für die Signaturanfrage festlegen.
description.fr: Definissez une date limite pour la demande de signature.
description.es: Define una fecha limite para la solicitud de firma.
description.ro: Seteaza un termen limita pentru cererea de semnatura.
description.it: Set a deadline for the signature request.

inputs.name: Title

description.en: Title of the document to be signed.
description.de: Titel des zu unterzeichnenden Dokuments.
description.fr: Titre du document a signer.
description.es: Titulo del documento que se va a firmar.
description.ro: Titlul documentului care trebuie semnat.
description.it: Title of the document to be signed.

inputs.bot: Short document title.

inputs.name: Document

description.en: Upload the PDF document to be signed. The SHA-256 fingerprint will be computed automatically.
description.de: Lade das zu unterzeichnende PDF-Dokument hoch. Der SHA-256-Fingerabdruck wird automatisch berechnet.
description.fr: Televersez le document PDF a signer. L empreinte SHA-256 sera calculee automatiquement.
description.es: Sube el documento PDF que hay que firmar. La huella SHA-256 se calculara automaticamente.
description.ro: Incarca documentul PDF care trebuie semnat. Amprenta SHA-256 va fi calculata automat.
description.it: Upload the PDF document to be signed. The SHA-256 fingerprint will be computed automatically.

inputs.bot: Show a file upload embed. Use desk document if already pinned.

inputs.name: Deadline

description.en: How long does the signer have to sign?
description.de: Wie lange hat der Unterzeichner Zeit zum Unterzeichnen?
description.fr: Combien de temps le signataire a-t-il pour signer ?
description.es: Cuanto tiempo tiene la persona firmante para firmar?
description.ro: Cat timp are semnatarul la dispozitie pentru a semna?
description.it: How long does the signer have to sign?

inputs.bot: Deadline in hours. Use 0 for no deadline, 24 for one day, 168 for a week.

inputs.name: Signer Email

description.en: Signer's email address. They will receive a signing link.
description.de: E-Mail-Adresse des Unterzeichners. Er erhält einen Link zum Unterzeichnen.
description.fr: Adresse e-mail du signataire. Il recevra un lien de signature.
description.es: Correo de la persona firmante. Recibira un enlace para firmar.
description.ro: Adresa de e-mail a semnatarului. Va primi un link pentru semnare.
description.it: Signer's email address. They will receive a signing link.

inputs.bot: Email address of the person who needs to sign the document.

inputs.name: Signer Name

description.en: Signer's name (optional)
description.de: Name des Unterzeichners (optional)
description.fr: Nom du signataire (optionnel)
description.es: Nombre de la persona firmante (opcional)
description.ro: Numele semnatarului (optional)
description.it: Signer's name (optional)

inputs.bot: Full name of the signer, used in the notification email.

success.en: Signature request sent! The signer will receive an email with a signing link.
success.de: Signaturanfrage gesendet! Der Unterzeichner erhält eine E-Mail mit einem Link zum Unterzeichnen.
success.fr: Demande de signature envoyee ! Le signataire recevra un e-mail avec un lien de signature.
success.es: Solicitud de firma enviada. La persona firmante recibira un correo con el enlace para firmar.
success.ro: Cererea de semnatura a fost trimisa! Semnatarul va primi un e-mail cu linkul de semnare.
success.it: Signature request sent! The signer will receive an email with a signing link.

description.en: Upload a document and sign it yourself. Creates an on-chain proof of authorship — ideal for sending a signed copy via email.
description.de: Lade ein Dokument hoch und unterzeichne es selbst. Erstellt einen On-Chain-Nachweis der Urheberschaft — ideal zum Versenden einer unterzeichneten Kopie per E-Mail.
description.fr: Telechargez un document et signez-le vous-meme. Cree une preuve d authenticite on-chain — ideal pour envoyer une copie signee par e-mail.
description.es: Sube un documento y firmalo tu mismo. Crea una prueba de autoria on-chain — ideal para enviar una copia firmada por correo.
description.ro: Incarca un document si semneaza-l singur. Creeaza o dovada de paternitate on-chain — ideal pentru a trimite o copie semnata prin e-mail.
description.it: Upload a document and sign it yourself. Creates an on-chain proof of authorship — ideal for sending a signed copy via email.

description.en: On-chain document signatures. Send signing requests by email. All agreements anchored on the blockchain.

description.es: Firmas de documentos on-chain. Envia solicitudes de firma por correo electronico. Todos los acuerdos quedan anclados en la blockchain.
description.ro: Semnaturi de documente on-chain. Trimite cereri de semnare prin e-mail. Toate acordurile sunt ancorate pe blockchain.

warp.name: Signature: Self-Sign

description.en: Upload a document and sign it yourself. Creates an on-chain proof of authorship — ideal for sending a signed copy via email.

warp.bot: Self-sign a document on-chain. Upload file first (use desk if pinned), then collect title.

description.es: Sube el documento que quieres firmar.

description.en: Short title describing this document.

description.en: Create a new DNS record in a Cloudflare zone.

inputs.name: Zone ID

description.fr: The zone ID.
description.ro: The zone ID.
description.it: The zone ID.

inputs.name: Type

description.en: Record type: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.

description.fr: Record type: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.

description.it: DNS record name (e.g., 'example.com' or 'sub.example.com').

description.en: Convert HTML content to a PDF document using DomPDF. The generated PDF is stored in the team media library for sharing and download.
description.de: Wandle HTML-Inhalt mit DomPDF in ein PDF-Dokument um. Das erstellte PDF wird in der Team-Mediathek gespeichert und kann geteilt und heruntergeladen werden.

description.it: HTML content to convert to PDF

en: Generate a PDF invoice from HTML for sending to a customer
Render a work report as a PDF for archival or sharing
Create a formatted PDF document from structured content
de: Eine PDF-Rechnung aus HTML erstellen und an einen Kunden senden
Einen Arbeitsbericht als PDF rendern und archivieren
Ein formatiertes PDF-Dokument aus strukturierten Inhalten erstellen

en.question: What CSS is supported?
en.answer: The HTML is rendered with DomPDF which supports standard CSS for print. Use inline or embedded styles for best results.

en.question: Where is the PDF stored?
en.answer: The generated PDF is saved to the team media library and can be downloaded or shared from there.

de.question: Welches CSS wird unterstützt?
de.answer: Das HTML wird mit DomPDF gerendert, das Standard-CSS für Druck unterstützt. Verwende inline oder eingebettete Styles.

de.question: Wo wird das PDF gespeichert?
de.answer: Das erstellte PDF wird in der Team-Mediathek gespeichert und kann von dort heruntergeladen oder geteilt werden.

description.en: Set up a new on-chain voting community — a DAO, HOA, team, or any group. Required first step before any polls can be created or voted on. You become admin.
description.de: Neue On-Chain-Abstimmungsgemeinschaft einrichten — eine DAO, HOA, ein Team oder jede andere Gruppe. Pflichtschritt bevor Abstimmungen erstellt werden koennen.
description.fr: Creez une communaute de vote on-chain — DAO, copropriete, equipe ou autre. Etape obligatoire avant de pouvoir creer des sondages ou voter.
description.es: Crea una comunidad de votacion on-chain: DAO, comunidad de vecinos, equipo u otro. Paso obligatorio antes de crear encuestas o votar.
description.ro: Configureaza o comunitate de vot on-chain — DAO, asociatie, echipa sau orice grup. Pas obligatoriu inainte de a crea sondaje sau de a vota.
description.it: Set up a new on-chain voting community — a DAO, HOA, team, or any group. Required first step before any polls can be created or voted on. You become admin.

description.en: On-chain polls and voting groups for any community — property owners, DAOs, teams, and more.

description.ro: Sondaje on-chain si grupuri de vot pentru orice comunitate: proprietari, DAO-uri, echipe si multe altele.

description.en: Set up a new on-chain voting community — a DAO, HOA, team, or any group. Required first step before any polls can be created or voted on. You become admin.

warp.bot: Run this FIRST before creating any polls. A group (voting space) must exist before polls can be created or votes cast. Use a short lowercase slug like 'my-dao' or 'building-owners'. Set open_membership to true for public groups or false to require admin approval.

description.en: Create a new post in a Reddit subreddit. Supports both text posts and link posts.
description.de: Erstelle einen neuen Post in einem Reddit-Subreddit. Unterstützt sowohl Text-Posts als auch Link-Posts.
description.es: Crea una nueva publicación en un subreddit de Reddit. Admite publicaciones de texto y publicaciones de enlaces.
description.fr: Créez une nouvelle publication dans un subreddit Reddit. Prend en charge les publications de texte et les publications de liens.
description.ro: Creați o postare nouă într-un subreddit Reddit. Acceptă atât postări text, cât și postări cu link.
description.it: Crea un nuovo post in un subreddit di Reddit. Supporta sia post di testo che post di collegamento.

description.en: Interact with Reddit communities, subreddits, and posts. Read, create, comment, and search content with Reddit's API.
description.de: Interagiere mit Reddit-Communities, Subreddits und Posts. Lies, erstelle, kommentiere und durchsuche Inhalte mit Reddits API.

description.en: Create a new post in a Reddit subreddit. Supports both text posts and link posts.
description.de: Erstelle einen neuen Post in einem Reddit-Subreddit. Unterstützt sowohl Text-Posts als auch Link-Posts.
description.es: Crea una nueva publicación en un subreddit de Reddit. Admite publicaciones de texto y publicaciones de enlaces.
description.fr: Créez une nouvelle publication dans un subreddit Reddit. Prend en charge les publications de texte et les publications de liens.
description.ro: Creați o postare nouă într-un subreddit Reddit. Acceptă atât postări text, cât și postări cu link.
description.it: Crea un nuovo post in un subreddit di Reddit. Supporta sia post di testo che post di collegamento.

vars.ACCESS_TOKEN: env:REDDIT_ACCESS_TOKEN|Get your access token from Reddit OAuth2 authentication. See https://www.reddit.com/prefs/apps to create an app.

inputs.name: Subreddit

description.en: The subreddit name (without r/ prefix).
description.de: Der Subreddit-Name (ohne r/ Präfix).
description.es: El nombre del subreddit (sin el prefijo r/).
description.fr: Le nom du subreddit (sans préfixe r/).
description.ro: Numele subreddit (fără prefixul r/).
description.it: Il nome del subreddit (senza prefisso r/).

inputs.bot: The subreddit name without the 'r/' prefix where you want to post.

inputs.name: Title

description.en: The title of the post.
description.de: Der Titel des Posts.
description.es: El título de la publicación.
description.fr: Le titre du message.
description.ro: Titlul postării.
description.it: Il titolo del post.

inputs.bot: The title of your Reddit post. This is required and will be displayed prominently.

inputs.name: Text

description.en: The text content of the post (for text posts). Leave empty for link posts.
description.de: Der Textinhalt des Posts (für Text-Posts). Für Link-Posts leer lassen.
description.es: El contenido del texto de la publicación (para publicaciones de texto). Déjelo vacío para publicaciones con enlaces.
description.fr: Le contenu textuel de la publication (pour les publications textuelles). Laissez vide pour les publications de liens.
description.ro: Conținutul text al postării (pentru postări text). Lăsați gol pentru postările cu linkuri.
description.it: Il contenuto testuale del post (per i post di testo). Lascia vuoto per i post con link.

inputs.bot: The text content of your post. Use this for text/self posts. Leave empty if posting a link.

inputs.name: URL

description.en: The URL to link to (for link posts). Leave empty for text posts.
description.de: Die zu verlinkende URL (für Link-Posts). Für Text-Posts leer lassen.
description.es: La URL a la que vincular (para publicaciones de vínculos). Déjelo vacío para publicaciones de texto.
description.fr: L'URL vers laquelle créer un lien (pour les publications de liens). Laissez vide pour les messages texte.
description.ro: Adresa URL către care să faceți legătura (pentru postările cu linkuri). Lăsați gol pentru postări text.
description.it: L'URL a cui collegarsi (per i post di collegamento). Lascia vuoto per i post di testo.

inputs.bot: The URL you want to share. Use this for link posts. Leave empty if creating a text post.

inputs.name: Kind

description.en: Post type: 'self' for text posts, 'link' for link posts.
description.de: Post-Typ: 'self' für Text-Posts, 'link' für Link-Posts.
description.es: Tipo de publicación: 'yo' para publicaciones de texto, 'enlace' para publicaciones con enlaces.
description.fr: Type de publication : « soi » pour les publications textuelles, « lien » pour les publications avec lien.
description.ro: Tipul postării: „self” pentru postări text, „link” pentru postări cu link.
description.it: Tipo di post: 'self' per post di testo, 'link' per post con link.

inputs.bot: The type of post. Use 'self' for text posts or 'link' for link posts. Defaults to 'self' if text is provided, 'link' if URL is provided.

inputs.name: Send Replies

description.en: Whether to send inbox notifications for replies.
description.de: Ob Inbox-Benachrichtigungen für Antworten gesendet werden sollen.
description.es: Si se deben enviar notificaciones a la bandeja de entrada para obtener respuestas.
description.fr: S'il faut envoyer des notifications dans la boîte de réception pour les réponses.
description.ro: Dacă trebuie să trimiteți notificări în inbox pentru răspunsuri.
description.it: Se inviare notifiche di posta in arrivo per le risposte.

inputs.bot: If true, you'll receive inbox notifications when people reply to your post.

inputs.name: NSFW

description.en: Mark the post as Not Safe For Work.
description.de: Markiere den Post als nicht sicher für die Arbeit.
description.es: Marque la publicación como No segura para el trabajo.
description.fr: Marquez le message comme non sûr pour le travail.
description.ro: Marcați postarea ca Nesigură pentru muncă.
description.it: Contrassegna il post come Non sicuro per il lavoro.

inputs.bot: If true, marks the post as NSFW (Not Safe For Work).

inputs.name: Spoiler

description.en: Mark the post as a spoiler.
description.de: Markiere den Post als Spoiler.
description.es: Marca la publicación como spoiler.
description.fr: Marquez le message comme spoiler.
description.ro: Marcați postarea ca spoiler.
description.it: Contrassegna il post come spoiler.

inputs.bot: If true, marks the post as containing spoilers.

success.fr: Post créé avec succès ! ID du message : {{POST_ID}}
success.ro: Postare creată cu succes! ID postare: {{POST_ID}}
success.it: Post creato con successo! ID articolo: {{POST_ID}}

description.de: Erstelle und plane Social-Media-Beiträge für Twitter/X und LinkedIn über Typefully. Verfasse Inhalte, teile Threads automatisch auf und reihe Posts für optimale Veröffentlichungszeiten ein.

Create, schedule, and optimize your Twitter tweets and threads for maximum engagement.
Professional social media content creation and automated scheduling tool for Twitter marketing and thread writing.

Erstelle, plane und optimiere deine Twitter-Tweets und Threads für maximale Reichweite.
Professionelles Tool für Social-Media-Content-Erstellung und automatisierte Planung für Twitter-Marketing und Thread-Schreiben.

title.fr: Create or schedule a draft post
title.ro: Create or schedule a draft post
title.it: Create or schedule a draft post

description.en: Create and schedule social media posts for Twitter/X and LinkedIn via Typefully. Draft content, auto-split threads, and queue posts for optimal publishing times.
description.de: Erstelle und plane Social-Media-Beiträge für Twitter/X und LinkedIn über Typefully. Verfasse Inhalte, teile Threads automatisch auf und reihe Posts für optimale Veröffentlichungszeiten ein.
description.es: Create and schedule social media posts for Twitter/X and LinkedIn via Typefully. Draft content, auto-split threads, and queue posts for optimal publishing times.
description.fr: Create and schedule social media posts for Twitter/X and LinkedIn via Typefully. Draft content, auto-split threads, and queue posts for optimal publishing times.
description.ro: Create and schedule social media posts for Twitter/X and LinkedIn via Typefully. Draft content, auto-split threads, and queue posts for optimal publishing times.
description.it: Create and schedule social media posts for Twitter/X and LinkedIn via Typefully. Draft content, auto-split threads, and queue posts for optimal publishing times.

vars.API_KEY: env:TYPEFULLY_API_KEY|Get your API key in the Dashboard of Typefully.com

inputs.name: Content

description.en: The text content for the draft.
description.de: Der Textinhalt für den Entwurf.
description.es: The text content for the draft.
description.fr: The text content for the draft.
description.ro: The text content for the draft.
description.it: The text content for the draft.

inputs.bot: You can split into multiple tweets by adding 4 consecutive newlines between tweets.

inputs.name: Threadify
inputs.bot: If true, content will be automatically split into multiple tweets.

inputs.name: Share
inputs.bot: If true, returned payload will include a share_url.

inputs.name: Schedule Date
inputs.bot: Can either be an ISO formatted date (e.g.: 2022-06-13T11:13:31.662Z) or 'next-free-slot'.

inputs.name: Auto Retweet Enabled
inputs.bot: If true, the post will have an AutoRT enabled, according to the one set on Typefully for the account.

inputs.name: Auto Plug Enabled
inputs.bot: If true, the post will have an AutoPlug enabled, according to the one set on Typefully for the account.

en: Draft a tweet thread and schedule it for peak engagement hours
Publish a LinkedIn post immediately through Typefully
Queue up a week of social media content in advance
de: Einen Tweet-Thread entwerfen und für Spitzeninteraktionszeiten planen
Einen LinkedIn-Beitrag sofort über Typefully veröffentlichen
Eine Woche Social-Media-Inhalte im Voraus einreihen

en.question: How do I create or schedule a post on Typefully?
en.answer: Write a new draft post on Typefully and either publish it immediately or schedule it for a specific time.

de.question: Wie erstelle oder plane ich einen Beitrag auf Typefully?
de.answer: Schreibe einen neuen Entwurf auf Typefully und veröffentliche ihn sofort oder plane ihn für einen bestimmten Zeitpunkt.
